What helps make the Olympics so memorable are those special moments that don芒聙聶t often happen in the sports we tend to watch day to day. The Paris Olympics did not disappoint on that score.

CGTN芒聙聶s Hendrik Sybrandy speaks with Americans on the street to find out what stood out about this year芒聙聶s Games.
